subtopics.title: Components
subtopics.content:
- **1** modular game board (hexagonal sea tiles)
- **4** player boats
- **Trading post pieces** (per player)
- **Spice cubes** in 4 types (Yellow, Red, Green, Brown — ascending value)
- **Point cards** (scoring objectives)
- **Market tiles** (trading actions)
- **Bonus tokens**

subtopics.title: Board Setup
subtopics.content:
1. **Assemble board** — Arrange hex tiles to form the sea map (layout varies by player count).
2. **Place market tiles** on designated islands.
3. **Set up port tiles** with point cards.
4. **Place bonus tokens** on specific port tiles.
5. **All boats start** at the central harbor tile.

subtopics.title: Player Setup
subtopics.content:
- **1 boat** on the harbor.
- **Trading posts** in your supply.
- **Starting spices** — Each player gets a small starting supply of yellow cubes.
- **Score marker** on 0.

subtopics.title: Game Overview
subtopics.content: Century: Eastern Wonders is a pick-up-and-deliver game. Sail your boat between islands, build trading posts, convert spices, and fulfill point cards. Combines area exploration with spice trading.

subtopics.title: Turn Structure
subtopics.content:
On your turn:
1. **Move your boat** — Move to an adjacent sea tile (1 space free; additional spaces cost 1 spice each to the tiles you pass through).
2. **Take an action** at your destination:
   - **Market** — Trade spices according to the island's market tile.
   - **Port** — Fulfill a point card by paying the required spices.
   - **Harvest** — At the harvest island, take 2 yellow cubes.

subtopics.title: Key Actions
subtopics.content:
#### Trading Posts
- To use a market island, you must first build a trading post there (costs spices based on how many you've built).
- Each post built unlocks better conversion rates.
- **Outpost bonuses** — Building posts in specific patterns on your player board unlocks permanent bonuses.

#### Spice Conversion
- Market tiles show conversion rates (e.g., 2 yellow → 1 red).
- Upgrading spices is key: yellow → red → green → brown.

#### Fulfilling Point Cards
- Pay the required spice combination to claim a point card.
- First player to claim a card at a port may also take a bonus token.

subtopics.title: Special Rules
subtopics.content:
- **Spice limit** — Maximum 10 spice cubes at a time.
- **Bonus row/column** — Completing a row or column of trading posts on your player board gives bonuses.
- **Can combine with Century: Spice Road** — The "From Sand to Sea" variant combines both games.

subtopics.title: Scoring and Endgame
subtopics.content:
#### Trigger
- When any player claims their 4th point card, finish the round.

#### Scoring
- Point card values.
- Bonus tokens.
- 1 point per non-yellow spice cube remaining.
- **Highest total wins.**

subtopics.title: Beginner Tips
subtopics.content:
- **Build trading posts early** — More posts = better conversions and board bonuses.
- **Upgrade spices efficiently** — Plan conversion chains to minimize wasted moves.
- **Movement economy** — Stay near useful islands to reduce travel costs.

subtopics.title: Key Strategies
subtopics.content:
- **Post pattern bonuses** — Plan trading post placement to unlock row/column bonuses.
- **Route optimization** — Find circuits between harvest, conversion, and delivery islands.
- **Race vs efficiency** — Sometimes rushing 4 cheap cards beats slowly earning expensive ones.
- **Block opponents** — Building posts where opponents need them forces them to pay more.
